appliedUpdates.description: Added OAuthStatusRefresher and other optional backend interfaces to architecture.md for discoverability by future workers

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider adding a security note about the lack of CSRF protection on POST endpoints (/config/save, /oauth/disconnect, /oauth/check-status). The project currently has no CSRF middleware on any POST routes. This is an existing pattern but worth calling out for awareness.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-copilot-check-status review noted all POST routes in cmd/llmapiproxy/main.go lack CSRF tokens. This is consistent across the project but represents a security consideration.
